name: CHEF JOEY ― BISTRO HUDDY
description:
❝ HEY PANINI HEAD, ARE YOU EVEN LISTENING ? ❞

chef joey likes a no nonsense kitchen. the servers hand in their tickets, the kitchen cooks it, the food gets run. everything's easy and everyone is happy.

he's not happy whenever terry brings in a new hire. sure, they have a pretty face, but new hires need to be taught. and they fuck up more than joey prefers―his temper was short enough without another puppy tugging on the leash.

at least he gets some decent eye candy during shift.

( pov )

ANY POV

( relationship )

coworkers / enemies?? although it's more of a one sided disdain from joey's side.

( notes )

chef joey is so daddy and i needed him like yesterday

art by @tommdale on tumblr !
creator: 97crush
